ddls:
CREATE TABLE "phylogenetic_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., ER, Yule) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., tree-based, network-based) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Model parameters (e.g., branch lengths, substitution rates) */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., GB020, GB021) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., molecular, morphological) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the feature (e.g., DNA, protein) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trees" (
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tree */,
  "tree_name" TEXT /* Name of the tree */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tree */,
  "tree_type" TEXT /* Type of the tree (e.g., rooted, unrooted) */,
  "root_node" INTEGER /* ID of the root node */,
  "leaf_nodes" TEXT /* IDs of the leaf nodes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clades" (
  "clade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clade */,
  "clade_name" TEXT /* Name of the clade (e.g., Turkic, Tungusic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clade */,
  "clade_type" TEXT /* Type of the clade (e.g., monophyletic, paraphyletic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "language_families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the language family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language family */,
  "family_type" TEXT /* Type of the language family (e.g., Indo-European, Sino-Tibetan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tree used in the analysis */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the analysis */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature used in the analysis */,
  "log_likelihood" REAL /* Log-likelihood of the analysis */,
  "AICc" REAL /* AICc of the analysis */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was run */,
  "run_time" TEXT /* Time when the analysis was run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_tree_id FOREIGN KEY ("tree_id") REFERENCES trees ("tree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES phylogenetic_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "p_values" (
  "p_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each p-value */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis */,
  "clade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clade */,
  "p0" REAL /* P-value 0 */,
  "p1" REAL /* P-value 1 */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test used to calculate the p-value (e.g., likelihood ratio test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("p_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_p_values_clade_id FOREIGN KEY ("clade_id") REFERENCES clades ("clade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_p_values_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis */,
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tree */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., tree, clade) */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_tree_id FOREIGN KEY ("tree_id") REFERENCES trees ("tree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the analysis */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_platform" TEXT /* Platform used to access the analysis (e.g., web, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., co-author, reviewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
